creator: roger@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Port has been updated with the comments on the PR. 

However, I did not apply this change 
DISTNAME=      openam_0.2alpha1 
DISTNAME=      ${PORTNAME}_${PORTVERSION:S/a/alpha/} 

This change is correct, but I feel it is too complicated 
and makes the makefile harder to read by other less 
experienced users.
